description: Style NotePared down to the basics, this kurta from alma is just right for a layered boho chic or a simple off-to-college vibe. Add a splash of colourful jewellery for an interesting dimension. The simple silhouette and the minimal design details will balance the brighter accessories. Product DetailsRed printed boat neck kurta, has short sleeves, wine purple paneling at one side of the hem and no side slitsMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine washWash dark colours separatelyDry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
